impact: This advances the PP&D fixture-first crawl plan by proving checkpoint data fails closed before any live crawl, authenticated DevHub access, raw body persistence, or processor invocation without provenance.
summary: Add fixture-only public crawl frontier checkpoint validation with rejection coverage for unsafe crawl and handoff records.
target_task: Task checkbox-114: Task checkbox-109: Add validation for public crawl frontier checkpoint fixtures proving external domains, live authenticated URLs, missing skip reasons, raw crawl bodies, and processor handoffs without provenance are rejected.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
